attr.title: HillBand
attr.desc: A 16-step × 8-track hybrid sequencer: 4 drum tracks (Kick/Snare/Hat/Perc) and 4 melodic tracks (pitched sampler, chord type, scale cycling). Per-step velocity, mute/volume, baked effects (reverb/delay/chorus/bitcrush) on melodic tracks, patterns, chain, swing, tap tempo, sequence save/load, and a backing-loop player.
attr.inst: Shares HillChord and HillSequencer's sample library (ROMs/Samples on the SD card). On first launch HillBand installs its Python deps (needs network once).
